name: [GRIDHAND] Reporting Agent - Weekly: pull tasks from Airtable → generate summary → email

gridhand.scenario: Weekly: pull tasks from Airtable → generate summary → email client
gridhand.description: Every Sunday evening at 8pm, GRIDHAND's automation workflow kicks in, pulling all tasks from the past week out of Airtable and generating a concise summary of completed and pending tasks, which is then emailed to the business owner, allowing them to review progress and plan for the upcoming week ahead of Monday morning. This automated summary saves the owner several hours of manual effort each week, freeing them up to focus on high-priority tasks and client relationships. By receiving this weekly summary, the business owner can quickly identify areas that need attention and make data-driven decisions to drive growth and efficiency in their small business.
